title: 365 Days of Play
author: Megan Hewes Butler
description: 365 daily activities for kids covering games, crafts, recipes, and experiments — one for every day of the year.
author_bio: American children's book author focused on play-based learning and early childhood education.

title: Top End Girl
author: Miranda Tapsell
description: Australian Indigenous actress shares her journey of growing up as a bold Black woman navigating career, life, and love.
author_bio: Australian Aboriginal actress and screenwriter, known for the film The Sapphires.

title: Quit: The Power of Knowing When to Walk Away
author: Annie Duke
description: Challenges the never-quit ethos and shows how recognising when to stop is a powerful skill for better decisions.
author_bio: American professional poker champion and cognitive science PhD from Harvard.

title: 南极之南
author: 毕淑敏
description: 毕淑敏记录亲赴南极的旅行见闻与内心感悟，描绘极地壮阔孤寂的自然景观与人生思考
author_bio: 中国著名女作家，曾任海军军医，著有大量散文小说。

title: The Girl Who Touched the Stars
author: Bonnie Hancock
description: A true story of resilience and courage during a 254-day solo ocean adventure.
author_bio: Australian author focusing on children's inspirational and adventure stories.

title: My Animals and Other Animals
author: Bill Bailey
description: British comedian recounts his wonderfully odd encounters and life with all manner of animals.
author_bio: British stand-up comedian and musician known for his absurdist humour.

title: Ciao Bella! Six Take Italy
author: Kate Langbroek
description: Australian radio presenter uproots her family of six to live in Italy, told with warmth and humour.
author_bio: Australian radio host and columnist known for her warm, funny family narratives.

title: Somewhere, a Boy and a Bear
author: Gyles Brandreth
description: Published on Winnie-the-Pooh's centenary, this biography uncovers the moving story behind A.A. Milne and his bear.
author_bio: British author, broadcaster, and children's writer, former Member of Parliament.

title: Simply More
author: Cynthia Erivo
description: EGOT-winning actress encourages those who have been told they are too much to embrace their full selves.
author_bio: British-American Oscar nominee, acclaimed actress and singer.

title: Swell-Being
author: Blake Johnston
description: World-record surfer shares how ocean living and lifestyle shifts can improve mental and physical wellbeing.
author_bio: Australian surfer and wellness advocate promoting ocean lifestyle and mental health.

title: Maybe I Don't Belong Here
author: David Harewood
description: British actor candidly explores how racial identity struggles led to a psychotic breakdown and his road to recovery.
author_bio: British actor known for Homeland, who has spoken openly about his mental health.

title: From Scratch
author: Tembi Locke
description: American actress recounts her cross-cultural love story with an Italian chef and finding healing in Sicily after his death.
author_bio: American actress and author known for her memoir on love, loss, and cross-cultural life.

title: Love from Venice
author: Gill Johnson
description: A nostalgic and romantic memoir of a golden summer spent beside the Grand Canal in Venice.
author_bio: British romantic fiction author, specialising in love stories set in European cities.

title: Big Feelings
author: Liz Fosslien, Mollie West Duffy
description: An illustrated guide to accepting and managing difficult emotions — envy, anxiety, grief — when life feels hard.
author_bio: American workplace emotion researchers and illustrators, co-authors of two bestselling books.

title: Being You: A New Science of Consciousness
author: Anil Seth
description: Neuroscientist challenges our understanding of self and reality by exploring the brain science behind consciousness.
author_bio: British neuroscientist and professor at the University of Sussex researching the nature of consciousness.

title: Too Much
author: Tom Allen
description: British comedian delivers a self-deprecating account of being too much of everything — growing up and family life.
author_bio: British comedian and TV presenter, celebrated for his self-deprecating stand-up style.
